RED

## Description
In preplanning SKILL.md Phase 2.5 Step 3, add handling for escalate_to_epic finding type: when received, append a new SC to the epic description via ticket edit and emit REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] preplanning SKILL.md contains escalate_to_epic handling
  Verify: grep -q 'escalate_to_epic' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] Handling specifies ticket edit for SC append
  Verify: grep -A5 'escalate_to_epic' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md | grep -q 'ticket edit'
